name: IoT & Operational Technology (OT)
description: Building management, industrial control, Splunk Edge Hub, and IoT platforms — sensor data, anomaly detection, and OT security.
quickTip: Deploy Splunk Edge Hub with built-in sensors or configure MQTT/OPC-UA/Modbus protocol collection.

subcategories.name: Building Management Systems (BMS)
subcategories.primaryAppTa: MQTT inputs, Modbus TA, SNMP, BACnet gateways, custom API inputs.

subcategories.name: Splunk Edge Hub
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk Edge Hub (hardware device), Splunk OT Intelligence (Splunkbase #5180). Sensor data flows as metrics via HEC to dedicated indexes.

subcategories.name: IoT Platforms & Sensors
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Custom API inputs, MQTT, webhook receivers.

subcategories.name: MQTT and OPC-UA (Edge Hub and Gateways)
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk Edge Hub (built-in MQTT broker, OPC-UA connector), Azure IoT Edge Hub, MQTT brokers (Eclipse Mosquitto, HiveMQ), OPC-UA gateways (KEPServerEX, Prosys), Splunk OT Intelligence.
subcategories.dataSources: MQTT topics (sensors, actuators, BMS, SCADA); OPC-UA nodes (PLC tags, alarms, history); Edge Hub health and connector metrics; gateway logs.

subcategories.name: Zeek ICS Deep Protocol Inspection
subcategories.primaryAppTa: TA for Zeek (Splunkbase 5466), Corelight App for Splunk (Splunkbase 3884), TA for Corelight (Splunkbase 3885). Parses CISA ICSNPP protocol analyzers.
subcategories.dataSources: Zeek ICS protocol logs from ICSNPP parsers: `sourcetype="zeek:s7comm:json"`, `sourcetype="zeek:modbus_detailed:json"`, `sourcetype="zeek:dnp3:json"`, `sourcetype="zeek:enip:json"`, `sourcetype="zeek:bacnet:json"`, `sourcetype="zeek:iec104:json"`, `sourcetype="zeek:hartip:json"`, `sourcetype="corelight_s7comm"`, etc.

subcategories.name: Litmus Edge Industrial IoT Gateway
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Litmus Edge (built-in Splunk HEC connector), custom HEC inputs.
subcategories.dataSources: Litmus Edge gateway sends device data, health metrics, and alerts via HEC as JSON events. `sourcetype="litmus:edge"`, `sourcetype="litmus:health"`, `sourcetype="litmus:tag"`.

subcategories.name: IoT & OT Trending
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk Add-on for Edge Hub (metrics), Industrial Protocols Add-ons (Modbus, OPC-UA), Splunk Operational Telemetry (OT/IoT) data model where enabled.
subcategories.dataSources: `index=ot` with `sourcetype=edge_hub:*`, `sourcetype=modbus:*`, `sourcetype=opcua:*`. Metrics indexes should expose device health, OEE, and anomaly scores via `metric_name` dimensions aligned to your Edge Hub pipelines.

subcategories.name: OT Network Security Monitoring (Cisco Cyber Vision / Nozomi Networks)
subcategories.primaryAppTa: `Cisco Cyber Vision Splunk Add-On` (Splunkbase 5748), `Cisco Cyber Vision Splunk App` · `Nozomi Networks Universal Add-on` (Splunkbase 6905), `CCX Extensions for Nozomi Networks` (Splunkbase 6796).
